title: NetherClone
description: Clone items with the power of the Gods
body:
The Gods will smite you if you upset them, they will bite you when you feed them so make sure your fingers are safe.
NetherClone for 1.16.4+ has changed it's recipe's please use JEI for now to get the updated changed.
How to use, Once you have created your tables and you have created your payment to that table -  NetherClone - Nether Stars -  NetherClone Netherite  - NetherCoins  

Hold the item you want to clone in your off hand and then use the food in your normal hand and give it to the block, DON'T do this when your low health as the nether gods bite when been fed so they will take some health from you.

    The updated Netherite Table takes NetherCoins and is able to clone 64, 32 and 8 stacks,    If you are willing to be struck by lightning and your Table sees the NIGHT sky you will be able to clone you item for a stack of 64, in the day light it would give you 32. If  you put the table somewhere safe or underground you will only be able to clone a stack of 8.     1.16 + and up recipes





  Feel free to use this in your YouTube lets plays and mod packs and private worlds, do not re-host anywhere.
